title: 40 x Duracell Ultra Power AAA Alkaline Batteries (10 x 4 Pack)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 10 packs of 4 Duracell Ultra Power AAA Alkaline Batteries = 40 Batteries.
description: From the manufacturer Duracell's number 1 longest lasting batteries* Duracell Ultra Power is Duracell's longest lasting battery*, recommended by device manufacturers such as Hasbro and Mag-Lite. * In AA alkaline, on average in all devices. Learn more about Duracell Ultra Power Duracell Ultra Power is Duracell's number 1 longest lasting battery for all devices*. This battery has more concentrated power** and provides you with reliable performance and long-lasting energy in many devices for every day. Duracell Ultra Power is the only Duracell battery. Press the white dots to see how much power is left in your battery. Your battery now has two lives. You can rely on Duracell Ultra Power to power your devices - digital cameras, portable game consoles, razors, remote controls, CD players, battery operated toys, flashlights, toothbrushes and many more. * In AA alkaline, on average in all devices. ** Compared to Duracell Simply. Features & Benefits Integrated The Powercheck ensures that you can see if there is still power in your battery so you can then continue to use it in another device. Thanks to Powercheck, your battery has two lives. Long-lasting power Concentrated power Duracell Ultra Power with more concentrated power* provides reliable performance and long-lasting energy in a wide range of everyday devices, so you have power at all times. * Compared to Duracell Simply.
